report.summary: Standup v4 ~14:10 UTC — two CRITICAL carry-overs resolved this cycle (rate limiting + fallback data now covering all routes); 284+ pages live; build still broken on 1b4a15e; 2 new PUBLISH_QUEUE items ready; GSC organic window imminent; Sprint 58 not yet started.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Last Standup
items: ✅ MAJOR DELTA: Rate limiter now ACTIVE on all API routes — resolves Day 13 carry-over (was 0/6, now 6/6). This was the single largest reliability risk heading into organic traffic arrival.
✅ MAJOR DELTA: Fallback data now configured on all routes — resolves carry-over (was 2/6 → 6/6). CoinGecko, DefiLlama, Alternative.me all have graceful degradation paths.
📄 2 new pages published this cycle: /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 + /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide — site now at 284+ pages live.
📋 PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 new items queued from latest build cycle — /learn/clarity-act-crypto-guide + /learn/privacy-coins-guide-2026 — ready for next publish cycle.
🔍 GSC Organic Signals: Still in pending window (day 14-21 for new domains). Site is day 15 — first impressions data could appear any time. Crawler activity expected to surge imminently.
📊 Data pipelines: CoinGecko (prices/trending/market-metrics), DefiLlama (yields), Alternative.me (fear-greed) — all healthy, TTLs correct, no errors observed.

⚠️ Build status unchanged: 1b4a15e still failing ('use client' + metadata export conflict in token-radar/risk-score/whale-watch). Production locked at d3bce36 (282 live from last stable deploy — new pages from Mar 16 publish not yet serving until redeploy).
⚠️ Vercel redeploy still pending: Chrome extension offline, manual trigger required at vercel.com/0x-machina/cryptodegen/deployments.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Delta vs Carry-Overs
items: RESOLVED ✅ Rate limiting (checkRateLimit) — wired to all 6 public API routes. Carry-over since Day 13 is officially CLOSED.
RESOLVED ✅ Fallback data — FALLBACK_DATA added to all remaining routes (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields). No longer returning 502 on upstream failure.
PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 + /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide — both QA-passed (H1, metadata, OG tags, JSON-LD, breadcrumbs all confirmed).
QUEUED 📋 /learn/clarity-act-crypto-guide + /learn/privacy-coins-guide-2026 — scaffolded and in PUBLISH_QUEUE, awaiting next publish cycle.

OPEN 🔴 Build error: Remove 'use client' OR move metadata to layout.tsx in 3 files (token-radar/page.tsx, risk-score/page.tsx, whale-watch/page.tsx). Same fix pattern applied successfully in prior sprints. ~15 min task.
OPEN 🔴 Vercel redeploy: All committed changes including 78 ecosystem/dApp routes + 2 new learn guides NOT serving until manual trigger. Action: vercel.com → ··· → Redeploy on current prod deployment.
BLOCKED 🟡 [Jefe] WalletConnect production Project ID (NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID) — wallet auth, gamification attribution, referral tracking all gated on this.
BLOCKED 🟡 [Jefe] GitHub Actions secrets — Playwright CI blocked; Sprint 58 code merges should not proceed without CI.
BLOCKED 🟡 [Jefe] Vercel Pro billing — trial expires ~9 days; payment method needed at vercel.com/account/billing.
CARRY-OVER: 100/284 published slugs missing page.tsx — audit triage needed to separate pipeline gaps from genuine missing content.
CARRY-OVER: AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17 JSX errors) + structured-data.examples.ts (8 JSX errors) — non-blocking via ignoreBuildErrors but should be cleaned.
SPRINT 58 STATUS: Not yet started — DeFiLlama Live API (Screener V3), Email Drip via Resend, Referral Backend are queued but no commits landed.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Fix build error (15-minute task). The 'use client' + metadata pattern has been fixed 3× before — this is copy-paste. Fixing it unblocks: deploying 78 ecosystem/dApp routes, serving the 2 new learn guides (crypto-tax + ethereum-pectra), and clearing the path for Sprint 58 merges. Nothing else can reach production until this lands.

PRIORITY 2 — Trigger Vercel redeploy manually TODAY. Production is running d3bce36, not current. Two newly published learn guides are invisible to users and crawlers until a redeploy fires. The fix is 2 clicks at vercel.com. GSC is about to activate — every hour of delay is a missed crawl signal.

PRIORITY 3 — Start Sprint 58: DeFiLlama live data for Bloomberg Screener V3. With rate limiting and fallback data now fully resolved, the data infrastructure is ready for the next unlock. Screener V3 is the highest-traffic tool on the site currently running mock TVL/APY/Volume. Replacing mock data with live llama.fi feeds is the single highest-credibility move before organic users arrive. Assign: Data Engineer (pipeline) + Programmer (Screener V3 wire-up).
